properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 135/22 
 ISPS SECURITY INFOMATION
  
 PLEASE BE INFORMED THAT THE MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL IS RAISED TO LEVEL 2 FROM 030930 UTC OKT 22 IN THE FOLLOWING NORWEGIAN PORT FACILTIY
 NOHAU-0003. KILLINGOEY SUBSEA AND OFFSHOREBASE
  
 SHIPS CALLING AT THIS FACILITY SHALL RESPOND WITHOUT DELAY TO THIS CHANGE IN SCURITY LEVEL.
